name: jig-typescript
description: TypeScript, React hooks, state/data flow, component API, and type-system review skills.

interface.longDescription: TypeScript-focused Codex skills for behavior-preserving simplification, type-system review, React hooks/effects lifecycle review, React state/data-flow review, and React component/hook API review across type safety, API shape, render purity, state ownership, cache flow, reusable UI contracts, prop modeling, cleanup, and stale closures.
defaultPrompt: Review the TypeScript types in this diff
Review React hooks and effects in this diff
Review React state and data flow in this diff
Review React component and hook APIs in this diff
